success_criteria: No hardcoded secrets detected; Commit messages follow conventional commits; Pre-commit hooks (Husky) pass linting (ESLint) and formatting (Prettier).
escalation_procedure: Developer resolves locally; Persistent failures flagged to Tech Lead.
business_impact: Prevents credential leakage and maintains code style consistency.

success_criteria: Next.js frontend builds without errors; NestJS backend compiles successfully; Docker images build successfully; No circular dependencies detected.
escalation_procedure: Notify committing developer immediately via Slack/Email.

success_criteria: Auth Service coverage > 95%; Payout Saga coverage > 95%; Audit Logging > 95%; General Backend > 80%; Frontend Components > 80%. All tests must pass.
escalation_procedure: Code Reviewer rejects PR if coverage decreases.
business_impact: Reduces regression risk in critical financial and security modules.

success_criteria: Zero Critical or High severity vulnerabilities; Technical Debt Ratio < 5%; No OWASP Top 10 injection risks detected.
escalation_procedure: Security Architect review required for bypassing false positives.
business_impact: Prevents introduction of exploitable vulnerabilities like SQLi or XSS.

success_criteria: Payout Saga rollback verified; Stripe Webhook signature verification passes; AWS Comprehend PII redaction accuracy > 99% on test set; Vector search integration functioning.
escalation_procedure: Immediate alert to Backend Lead; Block deployment to Staging.
business_impact: Ensures microservices and external APIs (Stripe, OpenAI) interact correctly.

success_criteria: Zero Critical/High CVEs in base images (Node.js/Alpine); Minimal image footprint verified.
escalation_procedure: DevOps Lead must patch base image or apply mitigation.
business_impact: Mitigates supply chain attacks and container breakouts.

success_criteria: API p95 latency < 250ms (Nominal Load); SOW Processing < 30s; Vector Search < 200ms; No memory leaks detected over 1-hour load test.
escalation_procedure: Performance Engineer analysis required; Optimization sprint triggered if regression > 10%.
business_impact: Ensures user experience meets SLAs and system scales under load.

success_criteria: 100% Pass on Critical Paths: Login -> MFA -> SOW Upload -> Match -> Payout; Vendor Portal submission flow functional.
escalation_procedure: QA Lead investigation; Release hold until hotfix applied.
business_impact: Validates full user journeys and business logic in a production-like environment.

success_criteria: No High/Critical vulnerabilities exploitable in Staging environment (e.g., IDOR, Broken Auth).
escalation_procedure: Security Architect validates findings; blocking issue for Production release.
business_impact: Identifies runtime security issues not caught by static analysis.

success_criteria: All prior gates passed; Change Request approved; Rollback plan verified; Financial reconciliation scripts ready.
escalation_procedure: CTO approval required for emergency bypass.
business_impact: Final governance check to prevent unauthorized or risky deployments.
